expected_effect: Improve low-retail and low-volatility slices by modestly undercutting the normal-condition fee without changing toxic-state behavior.
rationale: Recent evidence says the current line is close to optimal but likely still a bit expensive in genuinely calm normal conditions. External fee papers suggest a stable low fee in normal markets and much higher protection only in stressed regimes, so test a tiny direct fee step-down only after long, already-quiet conditions.
title: Threshold calm fee step
